guidance: Interpret a genuinely recent, relevant marketing/software development for service-business owners: what it means and what they should do. Be the interpreter, not a reposter.
evidence_note: Only if current and verifiable from your research. Cite the source. Distinguish fact from interpretation.
reason: Balancing the mix: 'News / Industry Intelligence' was the most under-served eligible category (target 15%, recent 0%).
post_rationale: GoHighLevel's own July 2026 changelog confirms a fix for a real, common follow-up failure, and this account hasn't covered CRM platform news before, filling the under-served News/Industry Intelligence slot with something owners can act on immediately.

guidance: Use a credible external study to explain why a capability matters. Qualified language: 'Research suggests...', 'The study found...'.
evidence_note: Attribute the source. NEVER imply Black Arrow produced the result or achieves the same without evidence.
reason: Balancing the mix: 'Third-Party Research / Market Evidence' was the most under-served eligible category (target 10%, recent 0%).
post_rationale: Fills the under-served Third-Party Research category with a fresh HubSpot data point (the 10-minute definition of 'immediate') the account hasn't used, in the carousel format research shows wins saves for educational content.

post_rationale: Fills the under-served Demonstrations/System Walkthroughs category with the ad-to-first-response handoff, a stage this account hasn't shown yet (distinct from the missed-call text-back, review, reactivation, and CRM pipeline demos already shipped), using the slideshow format the brief recommends for this category.
